# Nicon Built — Heritage Renovation & Custom Builder Melbourne
# niconbuilt.com.au

> Nicon Built is a licensed Melbourne builder specialising in heritage home renovations, restorations, extensions, kitchen and bathroom renovations, general trades and maintenance, and new builds across Melbourne's inner southern and bayside suburbs. Founded by Nick Kafkalas in Port Melbourne in 1990, every project is run personally by him. VBA licensed, fully insured, 30+ years experience, 5.0 stars across 9 Google reviews.

## Key Pages
- /heritage-renovations-melbourne/: Heritage home renovation and restoration services
- /heritage-home-extensions-melbourne/: Heritage-compliant home extensions
- /kitchen-renovations-melbourne/: Kitchen renovations
- /bathroom-renovations-melbourne/: Bathroom renovations
- /home-renovations-melbourne/: Home renovations and extensions
- /home-maintenance-melbourne/: Trades and maintenance (general trade coordination)
- /new-builds-melbourne/: New builds and dual-occupancy projects
- /about/: About Nick Kafkalas and Nicon Built
- /our-work/: Completed project gallery
- /testimonials/: Client reviews
- /contact/: Get a quote or speak to Nick directly
